title: Support saving multiple images to oci-archive:
body:
As mentioned in containers/image#610 and implemented in containers/image#996,  **docker-archive** transport is perfectly supported to save multiple images into one docker archive file. 
How about saving multiple images into one oci archive file with **oci-archive** transport?

comments.body: Not currently; you can follow containers/image#1072 and related tickets for updates.
